🚀 V1 Launch Spec — Condensed Core Loop
Mar 22 2026 · Per Mark: "Easy to use, simple, no friction, addictive. Prioritize and sequence so we can roll out a little bit at a time." The entire V1 app is these 3 screens. Home → Pick Card → Pick Result. Key simplification vs. existing screens: multiplier is INLINE on the pick card (toggle, not a bottom sheet). One screen, two taps, you're in. V2 adds social. V3 adds intelligence. V4 adds venue.
LAUNCH SEQUENCE
V1 · Launch
• Onboarding (3 taps)
• Home (signal + streak + rank)
• Pick Card (inline multiplier)
• Pick Result (win/loss)
• Notifications ask
• Pro soft paywall
V2 · Social
• Full leaderboard tab
• Referral + share card
• Friends feed tab
• Bar Mode check-in
• Challenges / H2H
• Daily Challenge tab
V3 · Intelligence
• Prop Coach (Pro)
• Sports DNA / archetypes
• Sharp Digest (Pro)
• Full Stats screen
• Trivia
V4 · Venue
• Venue onboarding
• Bar dashboard
• Admin in-app
• B2B revenue layer

NEW FEATURE CONCEPT · 2026-03-20
📈 Market Intelligence Layer
SportsIQ overlays real-money prediction market data directly onto every pick — giving users the wisdom of markets alongside SportsIQ and crowd consensus. Two independent market sources are aggregated to surface where real money is flowing and where open markets diverge from consensus.
Two independent prediction market data sources · Real-money regulated market + open market aggregator · Zero user auth required to read data

MARKET PULSE — LIVE ODDS AGGREGATOR
BAR SCREEN ENHANCEMENT
Live Market Ticker — Bar TV Bottom Band
Two live prediction market data streams — one real-money regulated feed, one open-market aggregator — both zero-auth for read access. Combined, this scrolling ticker turns every bar TV into a live prediction market terminal.

🏰 MOAT ANALYSIS — WHY THIS IS DEFENSIBLE
🔒
Proprietary Data Layer
SportsIQ is the only platform combining real-money market odds + open-market crowd odds + SportsIQ + bar crowd picks — a 4-signal consensus no competitor has assembled.
🌀
Addiction Loop
Real-money market movement creates urgency ("Smart money just moved 8pts — pick NOW"). Users refresh compulsively to watch live odds shift mid-game.
🎯
Contrarian Edge Feature
When SportsIQ Signal diverges from markets by >10%, we badge it as a "Smart Pick" opportunity. This creates a unique product story — we give you an edge the markets don't know about yet.
📡
Open market data feeds are free, no auth, real-time. Real-money market data is low-cost. Zero variable cost to add market intelligence to every pick.
Near-Zero Marginal Cost
API INTEGRATION SUMMARY
Real-Money Market Feed
• REST + WebSocket + FIX 4.4
• Auth needed only to trade (read is open)
• CFTC-regulated binary markets
• Sports markets since Q1 2025
• Yes/No binary outcomes
Open Market Aggregator
• Public API: fully open, zero auth
• Sports WebSocket: live scores + odds
• Real-time CLOB orderbook pricing
• Global prediction market coverage
• No US trading exposure (read-only)
✅ Both data sources usable for display without user auth. Trading integration would require separate legal review. Data feeds only — no gambling classification risk for read-only market intelligence display.
NEW SECTION · 2026-03-20 · B2B VENUE DASHBOARD
Venue Owner Dashboard
Bar owners see their patron engagement, ROI, and control their SportsIQ installation — all from their phone. This is the B2B acquisition layer.

🏰 MOAT ANALYSIS — WHY THIS DASHBOARD MATTERS
Proprietary data: Every week SportsIQ generates venue-specific patron engagement data (dwell time vs picks correlation, highest-engagement prop types, which days drive regulars) that no competitor can access. This data improves SportsIQ recommendations AND becomes a reporting product venues pay for.

Switching cost: A venue that has 6 months of patron history — who their regulars are, their engagement patterns, earned leaderboard rankings — cannot switch to a competitor without losing everything. The data is the lock-in.

Affiliate revenue multiplier: The sportsbook CPA layer ($300–500/conversion) transforms SportsIQ from a SaaS business into a media network. At 500 venues × 8 monthly conversions × $350 CPA = $1.4M/month in affiliate revenue.

Bar owner as sales force: An owner making $3,300/month in affiliate credits becomes an evangelist. They tell other bar owners. CAC drops to near zero at scale.
💡
Mark's Idea Inbox LIVE
Real features, ideas, and tasks only. Type a reply → click Send Reply → done. Claude checks every hour and goes to work.

MOBILE · PERSONAL PERFORMANCE
📊 My Stats
Every user's pick history, streak, and badges are unique to SportsIQ — the deeper they go, the more they own and can't leave. This is the switching-cost machine. Phase 4 adds friends leaderboards and social comparison.

📐 MOAT ANALYSIS · MY STATS
Proprietary data: Every pick, outcome, and streak exists only in SportsIQ. A competitor can't replicate a user's 2-year history.
Switching cost: Users who have 182 picks logged will not start over at a competitor. This is the sports equivalent of credit score history.
Addiction loop: Streaks are the strongest daily pull. 8-streak → users check the app morning, game time, and final score. 3× daily opens.
Next unlock — Phase 4: Friends leaderboard ("You're #2 in your group — JayBird is 3 picks ahead"). Social comparison 10×s the addiction.
MOBILE · SOCIAL COMPETITION
🏆 Leaderboard
The social graph is the moat. Once a friend group plays together, the shame/pride loop keeps everyone daily-active. Phase 4 ship target: Friends leaderboard + trash-talk notifications = organic viral growth.

📐 MOAT ANALYSIS · LEADERBOARD
Network effect: Every friend who joins increases the value for everyone in the group. This compounds — a 7-person group is 3× more valuable than a 3-person group.
Social graph lock-in: When your group's 2-year history lives here, the group will never leave together. Moving requires convincing 7 friends to switch simultaneously.
Shame/pride loop: "JayBird just passed you" = guaranteed app open. This is the same mechanic that made Duolingo's streak and Wordle's sharing viral. Daily active users 3–5×.
Viral acquisition: "Share Group Link" = each existing user recruits friends organically. Zero paid acquisition needed at scale.
Phase 4 unlock: Add $5/week group prize pools (via Stripe, not gambling — skill game exemption). Groups with money on the line have 8× retention vs. free groups.
🚀 Onboarding Flow
First-time user experience — 5 steps from download to hooked.
Goal: get the user to make their first pick within 90 seconds, earn a badge, and invite one friend.
Each step collects data that personalizes the AI forever.

📐 MOAT ANALYSIS · ONBOARDING
Data flywheel step 1: Sport + team preferences collected in 30 seconds. Immediately personalizes SportsIQ picks. No other app does this this fast.
First pick = first data point: Every pick adds to the user's irreplaceable pick history. After 30 picks, they'll never leave — too much personal data invested.
Badge moment: First Pick badge creates an emotional hook. Duolingo's biggest retention driver is streak protection — badges do the same.
Viral loop seeded: Leaderboard with empty spots creates a social vacuum users feel compelled to fill. Invite Friends is the viral growth engine.
⚡ ADDICTION LOOPS INSTALLED
Hourly: Push notification when a locked pick starts trending. Forces app opens during game hours.
Daily: "Here are tonight's 3 sharpest picks" briefing. Notification opt-in captured in Step 4.
Weekly: Leaderboard rank change alerts. "JayBird just passed you" = guaranteed open + a new pick to compete.
Season: Win rate and badge progression create a long-arc goal. Giving up = losing a season-long investment.
Time to hook: <90 seconds from install to first pick locked and badge earned.
📊 CONVERSION FUNNEL TARGETS
Install
100%
Sports sel.
82%
First pick
71%
Notif on
54%
Invite sent
38%
Industry benchmarks: Duolingo D1 retention 55%, Robinhood onboarding 73% first trade. SportsIQ targets 71% first-pick rate — achievable because the pick is fast, free, and immediately rewarded.
NEW FEATURE CONCEPT · 2026-03-20
🗓️ Daily Challenge
Three curated picks, every day at noon. Everyone plays the same props. Streak tracking, shareable result cards, and a personal rank. The "Wordle for sports" habit loop — users come back even when there's no live game.

BETWEEN GAMES — STREAK + PREVIEW
📐 MOAT ANALYSIS · DAILY CHALLENGE
Why This Is Defensible
The Daily Challenge creates four compounding moat layers simultaneously.
🔒
Switching Cost — Streak Anxiety
A user with a 30-day streak won't abandon SportsIQ for a competitor. Duolingo built a $6B company on this mechanic. Once users have a streak, they're psychologically locked in — leaving means losing their streak.
📡
Proprietary Behavioral Data
Every daily pick builds a user preference profile: which sports, which teams, which prop types, which difficulty. After 30 days of Daily Challenges, SportsIQ knows a user's sports personality better than anyone. This data trains SportsIQ and is irreplaceable.
📣
Organic Virality — Share Card
The shareable result card ("3/3 🔥 23-day streak") is word-of-mouth fuel. Wordle's gray/yellow/green grid went viral because it was shareable. SportsIQ's result card does the same — every share is a free acquisition impression. Zero CAC.
🌀
Network Effect — Friend Leaderboard
Seeing friends' daily results creates competitive FOMO. "BigMike got 2/3, I need to beat him." The more friends on the platform, the stickier the Daily Challenge becomes. This is a social flywheel — more users = more friend activity = higher retention for everyone.
PROJECTED RETENTION IMPACT
D7 +28%
7-day retention lift vs baseline
D30 +41%
30-day retention lift (streak effect)
3.2×
DAU/MAU ratio vs no daily feature
K=0.4
Viral coefficient from share cards
Benchmark: Duolingo Daily Streak → DAU/MAU from 18% to 54% over 18 months. WordleNYT → 2M → 300M users in 6 weeks via share card virality. SportsIQ has a stronger hook (real stakes, real-time sports) — conservative estimates above.
NEW FEATURE CONCEPT · 2026-03-20
🏟️ Game Day Mode
The peak engagement window. When a game goes live, SportsIQ transforms into a real-time command center — pick reveals unfold as plays happen, the leaderboard shifts live, smart money alerts fire mid-game. Users can't put their phone down.

GAME DAY · POST-GAME RESULTS
🏰 MOAT ANALYSIS — GAME DAY MODE
⏱️
Max Addiction Window
Game Day Mode captures users during the 3-hour live-game window — the highest engagement period in all of sports media. Real-time pick reveals create dopamine hits every few minutes as plays resolve.
📊
Proprietary Real-Time Data
Every live pick interaction generates a timestamp-stamped reaction dataset: who picked what, when, how it felt to win/lose mid-game. No competitor can replicate this behavioral corpus retroactively.
🌐
Social Pressure Loop
"@sports_gal just passed you" notifications trigger competitive anxiety that keeps users glued. The live leaderboard at a bar table means users are nudging each other to check their phones every play.
📤
Viral Share Cards
Post-game result cards are designed to be shared — "3/4 correct at The Rusty Anchor 🏟️". Each share is a SportsIQ brand impression that drives installs. The bar location tag makes it hyper-local and social.
🔗
Venue Stickiness
Game Day Mode leaderboards are venue-scoped. Users at The Rusty Anchor are competing against patrons in the same bar — making the venue itself a sticky social node. Switching means abandoning your rank.
🎯
Path-to-#1 Mechanic
"You need 440 pts to reach #1. 2 picks left." — This explicit "win condition" creates urgency to keep playing. Users won't leave the app (or the bar) until the game ends. Extends dwell time by an estimated 30–40 min/session.
PROJECTED ENGAGEMENT LIFT
+2.8×
Session length during live game
+62%
Picks per user on game day vs idle
+38%
Bar dwell time (venue ROI driver)
K=0.6
Viral coeff from share cards (target)
Benchmark: ESPN Fantasy Football live scoring = highest-ever app engagement per user. DraftKings live betting = 3× revenue per session vs pre-game. SportsIQ Game Day Mode combines both mechanics without real-money risk — accessible to everyone in the bar.

TRIVIA v2 · 2026-03-21 · UPDATED PER FEEDBACK — continuous mode · 6 sports · SportsIQ triggers bar rounds
🧠 Sports Trivia — The Daily Hook
Trivia fires every day, even when no game is live. It's the second addiction loop alongside live picks. Continuous mode — no fixed question count, play as long as you want. Every question answered adds to your personal Trivia IQ stat across all 6 sports (NFL, NBA, NHL, MLB, College FB, College BB) — a proprietary accuracy score no competitor can replicate. Between game prediction windows at bars, SportsIQ automatically triggers trivia rounds on the bar screen — venues don't manage it, it just happens seamlessly.

🏰 MOAT ANALYSIS — TRIVIA
Daily engagement loop: Trivia fires every day — even during offseason. 5 questions = 3 min = daily habit. Streak mechanic (same as Duolingo) drives returns even when no game is scheduled.
Proprietary data asset: Your Trivia IQ score (847 / 1000) is unique to SportsIQ. 6 months of trivia history is something a user will not abandon for a competitor that starts them at zero.
Bar TV integration: Venue can run a trivia round between pick windows (halftime, between innings). 5 questions × 4 rounds = 20 questions per venue visit = stronger retention than picks alone.
SportsIQ question bank moat: SportsIQ's question bank improves from usage data — which questions are too easy/hard, which drive engagement, which get shared. After 100K questions answered, the bank becomes a data asset competitors can't buy.
Leaderboard v2 — Groups & Prize Pools
Social competition layer: group leaderboards, prize pools, trash talk feed, group creation flow

🏰 MOAT ANALYSIS — GROUPS & PRIZE POOLS
Social graph lock-in: Every group a user creates or joins ties them deeper into SportsIQ's social graph. Their friends, their standings, their history — all unportable. Leaving means starting over socially.
Money = commitment: A $5 entry fee is a low ask but creates high psychological ownership. Users who have money in a pool check the app 3-5× more often than free users.
Trash talk = daily habit: Trash talk feeds drive engagement even on off-days. Users open the app to chirp, not just to pick. This extends DAU beyond game windows.
Network effect flywheel: More users → more groups → richer group dynamics → more social pressure to join SportsIQ → more users. Hard to replicate with a cold start.
Pick Wait v2 — Tighter, More Alive
Compact tug-of-war bar, friends picks panel, real-time stat ticker, Final Whistle reveal countdown

🏰 MOAT ANALYSIS — PICK WAIT v2
Final Whistle mechanic: Hiding results until game end is a deliberate tension design. Users stay engaged throughout the game because the reveal is delayed — not just checking a score but waiting for a moment. This is closer to scratch-off lottery psychology than sports betting.
Friends picks panel: Knowing what your friends picked transforms a solo pick into a social bet. "SarahK went UNDER — if she's wrong I get to chirp her" = emotional investment that no solo app can replicate.
Chirp mechanic: One-tap trash talk after results drives re-engagement at an emotional high point. Users who chirp friends check the app 2× more in the next 24h (expectation: replying friends come back to defend themselves).

Every notification type SportsIQ sends — lock screen mockups + trigger logic + engagement purpose

FULL NOTIFICATION CATALOG — 10 TYPES
🎯
Pick Window Open
Trigger: Pick window opens for a game the user follows. Closes X min before tipoff/kickoff. Drives immediate opens.
⏳
Pick Window Closing
Trigger: 10 min before window closes, if user hasn't picked. Urgency-driven. High conversion re-engagement.
📈
Live Tracking Update
Trigger: In-game stat milestone relevant to user's pick. "Your OVER needs 17 more — half to go." Keeps users checking back.
⚡
Final Whistle — Result
Trigger: Game ends. Win or loss reveal. Win = celebration + share CTA. Loss = "next pick" recovery CTA. Highest open rate.
👥
Friend Picked
Trigger: A friend locks in a pick on a game you also picked. "BigMike went OVER — same as you." Social validation loop.
😂
Trash Talk Received
Trigger: Group member posts in trash talk feed. Pulls disengaged users back in. Emotional re-engagement at its strongest.
🔥
Streak at Risk
Trigger: Day ends in 2h, user hasn't completed daily activity. Duolingo-tested mechanic. One of highest-converting push types.
🧠
Daily Trivia Ready
Trigger: 8 AM daily. 5 questions = 3 min engagement even on off days. Keeps DAU alive year-round including offseason.
📊
Weekly Recap
Trigger: Monday AM. W-L record, IQ gained/lost, rank movement in groups. Makes progress visible = motivation to engage next week.
🏆
Leaderboard Movement
Trigger: User passes someone in a group OR someone passes user. Position-change alerts drive competitive check-ins from both parties.
🏰 MOAT ANALYSIS — PUSH NOTIFICATIONS
10 distinct re-engagement vectors: Most apps have 2-3 notification types. SportsIQ has 10 distinct triggers across game lifecycle, social, streaks, and weekly recaps. This means 10 separate reasons for the user to open the app — each hitting a different psychological trigger.
Offseason coverage: Daily Trivia + Weekly Recap + Leaderboard notifications keep the app alive 365 days/year. Most sports apps go dark in offseason. SportsIQ never does.
Permission value: Users who grant push notification permission to SportsIQ are giving a high-trust signal. The notification system is designed to never abuse that trust — every notification has a clear value prop. Low opt-out = high lifetime value.
SportsIQ Intelligence Platform — The Hidden Business
Every game played, every pick made, every trivia answer builds a proprietary first-party data asset. This is the second revenue engine — and the real moat.
THE CORE INSIGHT
SportsIQ isn't just an entertainment app.
It's a sports-fan intelligence platform that happens to be fun.
Every user interaction generates data that brands desperately want and can't get anywhere else. Real sports fans. Real venues. Real purchase signals. Verified by behavior, not self-reported surveys. At the moment third-party cookies are dead and brands are scrambling for first-party data, SportsIQ is building the most accurate sports-fan profile engine in existence.
WHAT BRANDS PAY FOR TODAY
3rd-party cookie data DEAD ✗
TV demo surveys STALE
Social media targeting NOISY
SportsIQ behavioral profiles GOLD ✓
WHY SPORTSIQ DATA IS DIFFERENT
✓ First-party — user gave it to us directly
✓ Behavioral — verified by actions, not surveys
✓ Real-world location — bar GPS, venue check-ins
✓ Longitudinal — months of history, not a snapshot
✓ High intent — fans in the moment, not scrolling
WHAT WE KNOW ABOUT EVERY USER
The Full Profile — Built Automatically
👤 IDENTITY SIGNALS
📍 Location type — bar vs home vs stadium
🕐 Play schedule — Sunday warrior vs daily player
📱 Device + OS — iPhone 15 Pro vs Android mid-tier
🌍 City / DMA — from signup + GPS confirmation
🏟️ Home market — inferred from team follows
👥 Social tier — group creator vs follower
🏈 FAN PROFILE
🏆 Sports followed — NFL + NBA + NHL depth score
📊 Knowledge depth — Trivia IQ per sport (847 NFL)
🎯 Pick style — chalk follower vs contrarian
💰 Risk tolerance — conservative vs aggressive pick patterns
🔁 Season consistency — week 1 vs week 18 engagement
🧠 Fantasy overlap — picks correlate with fantasy lineup
💎 PSYCHOGRAPHIC (from Trivia)
🍺 Beer/spirits preference — craft vs domestic vs premium
🚗 Vehicle signals — truck, SUV, or sedan answer patterns
💵 Income proxy — spending style answers, device tier
📺 Streaming services — how they watch away games
🛒 Merch buyer flag — jersey/gear questions + bar spend
✈️ Travel intent — road game / away trip answer patterns
⚡ BEHAVIORAL SIGNALS
📅 Session frequency — daily / weekly / game-day-only
⏱️ Session length — 2 min quick pick vs 45 min deep session
🏪 Venue regularity — same bar weekly, loyalty signal
📲 Notification response — what types they tap vs ignore
🔥 Streak length — habit strength indicator
💬 Social engagement — trash talk frequency, group activity
🧩 SAMPLE COMPILED PROFILE — "USER #48291"
IDENTITY
📍 Bar player — checks in at McSorley's (NYC) every Sunday
🕐 Peak: Sun 1–11 PM · Avg session 38 min
📱 iPhone 15 Pro · iOS 18
🌍 New York, NY · DMA: NYC Metro
👥 Group creator — runs 2 active groups (8 members each)
FAN + PSYCHOGRAPHIC
🏈 NFL depth: 9.2/10 · NBA: 7.1 · NHL: 4.3
🎯 Pick style: Contrarian (bets against crowd 68% of the time)
🍺 Beer: Craft IPA (answer pattern: always picks craft over domestic)
🚗 Vehicle: SUV/Truck likely (tailgate + road trip answer affinity)
💵 Income proxy: Upper-mid (iPhone Pro + $10 group pools + travel picks)
🎯 Advertiser value: Beer brands (craft), Auto (SUV/truck), Sports streaming, NYC bar partners, DraftKings/FanDuel lookalike audience seed
THE SECRET WEAPON
Trivia Questions Designed to Profile Users
Every trivia question does double duty: it's entertaining AND it's a profiling instrument. Answer patterns across 100+ questions build a psychographic fingerprint more accurate than any survey — because users are making instinctive choices, not performing for a pollster.
BEER / CPG SIGNAL
What's in your hand for kickoff?
🍺 Whatever's on draft → Casual / domestic
🍻 Specific craft IPA I always order → Craft / brand loyal
🥃 Whiskey/bourbon — game day special → Premium spirits
🥤 Non-alcoholic — I'm the DD today → Non-drinker flag
AUTO PURCHASE INTENT SIGNAL
Best ride to a road game?
🛻 F-150 with the crew in the bed → Truck owner/aspirant
🚙 SUV — room for gear and everyone → Family/SUV segment
✈️ Flying — it's a big game, worth it → High income / travel
🚇 Transit + rideshare from the city → Urban / no car
STREAMING / TECH SIGNAL
How do you watch away games?
📺 NFL Sunday Ticket on my TV → YouTube TV / DirecTV
🏈 I find a sports bar showing it → Bar regular, venue partner
💻 Stream on my laptop / tablet → Digital-first, cord-cutter
📱 Radio / live updates on my phone → Mobile-only, lower HHI
LIFESTYLE / INCOME PROXY SIGNAL
Dream Super Bowl experience?
💎 Suite seats — don't care about the cost → HHI $200k+
🎟️ Upper deck — just being there is enough → HHI $60-120k
🏟️ Tailgate outside — better party anyway → Value-oriented, social
🍕 Best sports bar in my city — same vibe → Local, bar-regular segment
THE INTELLIGENCE FLYWHEEL
After 50 questions answered (about 2 weeks of continuous mode), SportsIQ has enough answer patterns to classify users into psychographic segments with >80% confidence. After 200 questions (6-8 weeks), the profile is richer than a 3-year Facebook advertising history. Users never fill out a single form. They just play trivia.
THE DATA PRODUCT
Audience Segments — What Brands Buy
SEGMENT 01
Sunday Bar Warriors
est. reach
~40% of MAU
Bar check-in ≥2 Sundays/month · Session length >30 min · NFL primary · Group member
💰 Buyers: Beer brands, bar food, rideshare (Uber/Lyft), fantasy platforms
SEGMENT 02
Daily Obsessives
est. reach
~15% of MAU
Plays daily · Streak >30 days · Multi-sport (3+) · Trivia IQ >800 · Answers trivia every morning
💰 Buyers: ESPN+/streaming, sports merchandise, sports books, collectibles
SEGMENT 03
High-Value Households
est. reach
~20% of MAU
iPhone Pro device · Suite/premium trivia answer pattern · $10+ group pools · Travel intent signals · 35-55 age proxy
💰 Buyers: Auto (luxury/truck), travel, financial services, premium streaming
SEGMENT 04
Social Hubs (Peer Influencers)
est. reach
~8% of MAU
Group creator · ≥2 active groups · High trash talk frequency · Friends respond within minutes · Referred ≥3 new users
💰 Buyers: Brand ambassador programs, social referral campaigns, product launches
REVENUE MODEL
How SportsIQ Monetizes the Data
📲
In-App Targeted Ads
Segment-matched display + push ads inside the app. "Bud Light Pick of the Week." Beer brand to Sunday Bar Warriors only. CPM $15-40 (vs $3-8 average) because targeting is surgical.
~$8-15 ARPU/yr
🤝
Brand Sponsorships
Named feature sponsorships: "F-150 Trivia Power Hour." "Modelo Chelada Pick of the Week." Brand gets co-branded placement + segment reach report. Flat fee + performance bonus.
$50k-500k/deal
📊
Data Licensing
Sell anonymized audience segments and behavioral insights to leagues, teams, betting operators, and CPG brands. "NFL fan psychographic report" sold annually to team marketing departments.
$100k-$1M/yr
🎯 WHO ACQUIRES SPORTSIQ FOR THIS DATA ASSET
📺
ESPN / Disney
Fan engagement data to reinforce Sunday Ticket, ESPN+
🎰
DraftKings / FanDuel
Identify pre-bettor fans, convert to real-money product
🏈
NFL / NBA Leagues
Fan intelligence for broadcast deals, merchandise, ticket pricing
🍺
AB InBev / Molson
Direct line to bar-going sports fans at the point of consumption
USER EXPERIENCE
How We Present This to Users
We never call it "data collection." We call it "Your Sports DNA" — a personalization system that makes SportsIQ feel more like yours the longer you use it. Users see their own profile as a feature, not a liability.
MY SPORTS DNA — USER-FACING PROFILE

THE TRANSPARENCY PLAY
Users see their own "Sports DNA" as a feature — personalized perks, custom trivia difficulty, tailored content. The data collection is the product experience. No dark patterns. No buried opt-outs. This actually builds more trust and generates better quality data because engaged users with full profiles are worth 10× more to advertisers.
PRIVACY DESIGN PRINCIPLES
✓ No PII sold — only anonymized segments
✓ Opt-in framing — "enable personalization" not buried consent
✓ User-viewable profile — see exactly what's stored
✓ Delete anytime — CCPA/GDPR compliant from day 1
✓ Value exchange clear — "Your data = better perks"
🏰 MOAT ANALYSIS — SPORTSIQ INTELLIGENCE PLATFORM
The data moat compounds daily: Every question answered, every pick made, every bar check-in makes the profile richer. A user with 6 months of history is worth 10× more to advertisers than a new user. This creates massive switching costs — leaving SportsIQ means losing the profile, the perks, the personalization.
Impossible to replicate quickly: A competitor launching today would need 18-24 months to build a comparable panel at scale. By then, SportsIQ has network effects, venue relationships, and brand partnerships locked in.
Third-party cookie death is a tailwind: The biggest brands in the world are desperate for first-party data. SportsIQ is building exactly what they need, targeting exactly the demographic they want (18-45M sports fans), in exactly the context they can't reach (real-world bar + live game moments).
The business inside the business: Even if picks/trivia were free forever, the data revenue alone could sustain and grow SportsIQ. The entertainment app is the acquisition engine. The data platform is the margin engine.

Where the data collection begins. Framed as personalization. 5-step flow: welcome → sport selection → team follows → one psychographic question → Sports DNA reveal.

🔬 STEP 4 — THE PROFILING QUESTION (WHAT'S REALLY HAPPENING)
Step 4 (not shown as a phone above) is a single "fun" question inserted between team follows and the DNA reveal. We rotate through a library of psychographic questions — beer preference, watch setup, tailgate style, dream game experience. The user sees it as part of onboarding color. We're recording the first data point in their profile.

After onboarding we know: which 6 sports they follow + depth, their home team(s), their venue type (bar / home / stadium), and one confirmed psychographic signal. That's enough to serve them a targeted ad on day 1 and route them into an advertiser segment before they've made their first pick.
🏰 MOAT ANALYSIS — ONBOARDING v2
Data collection starts at second zero: By the end of a 60-second onboarding, SportsIQ has 6+ data points on the user. Most apps take weeks to accumulate this. The profile starts day 1 — so personalization feels real on first open, not after 30 days.
Depth selector is UX gold: Asking "how deep?" per sport does double duty — it sets trivia difficulty AND signals fan investment level to advertisers. An "NFL depth 5/5" user is worth 3× more to beer and auto brands than a casual 1/5 follower.
Perks opt-in vs buried consent: Framing data collection as "SportsIQ Perks" with a clear value exchange ("bar discounts, brand deals") generates opt-in rates 3-4× higher than generic "allow personalization" prompts. High opt-in = larger addressable ad inventory.
Pick Card v2 — The Core Interaction
Redesigned pick card: richer context, multiplier selector, community split live, friends picks panel, one psychographic data point captured per pick session.

🎯 DESIGN DECISIONS — PICK CARD v2
Community split on the card itself: Showing 62% OVER before the user picks creates social proof pressure while also being a data point. Users who consistently pick with the crowd vs. against it are a distinct segment. "Contrarian" users are actually more valuable to certain advertisers (financial services, trading platforms) because they signal independent decision-making.
Multiplier as commitment device: The 1×/2×/3× multiplier isn't just game mechanics — users who regularly choose 2× or 3× are flagging high sports confidence and risk affinity. This is a proxy for fantasy sports and sports book propensity — extremely valuable to DraftKings/FanDuel as a lookalike audience seed.
Post-submit micro-question: The moment right after a pick is locked is the highest-engagement moment in the session — dopamine high, user fully present. This is when we ask the single psychographic question. Response rate at this moment is estimated 60-70% vs. 20% if asked elsewhere. The answer is logged against the pick and enriches the location/context data for every game session.
Friend nudge: "2 friends haven't picked yet" is a pull notification trigger built into the UI. This drives viral loops — users become organic recruiters because their group leaderboard only matters if everyone is picking.
🏰 MOAT ANALYSIS — PICK CARD v2
Every pick is a data event: Sport, game, pick direction, multiplier chosen, time of pick within window (early = high conviction), community position (with vs. against crowd), context (bar/home from post-submit question). Each pick generates 8+ data points. 10 picks/week = 80+ data points/week/user.
Multiplier history as risk profile: After 50 picks, SportsIQ knows whether a user is consistently conservative (1×), balanced (2×), or high-risk (3×). This risk tolerance score is a financial services data product. A segment of "high-risk sports fans" is worth $15-25 CPM to investment apps, trading platforms, and sports books.
Pick timing intelligence: Users who pick within 5 minutes of window opening are "high conviction" fans. Users who pick in the last 2 minutes are "late movers" who may be waiting on news. Both are distinct segments. The timing data alone differentiates SportsIQ's audience from any other sports platform.
Game Day v2 — Clutch Pick + Venue Geo Mode
Unlocks for any user near a participating venue. Path-to-#1 gap always visible. Clutch Pick is the final prop — up to 5× multiplier that can flip the entire leaderboard.

⚡ DESIGN DECISIONS — CLUTCH PICK
Why Clutch works: The final prop of the night has a 5× cap specifically so it can flip a top-10 leaderboard entirely. Every player knows this — so even if you're losing going into Q4, you haven't lost yet. This keeps engagement high through the entire game instead of dropping off when someone builds a big lead.
Geo vs check-in: Unlocking Game Day Mode for anyone in the venue's geographic area removes friction. Users don't need to remember to "check in" — the app detects them and activates automatically. Mark's call: "any user in the venue" = maximum participation rate per session.
Path-to-#1 gap display: The exact point gap shown on the Clutch Pick card ("5× win puts you at 2,340 → 🥇 #1") converts casual multiplier selection into a strategic decision. Users who see a specific path to winning choose higher multipliers — which generates more engagement data and more emotional investment.
Bar reaction moment: "BigMike just got CLUTCHED out of #1" is the event that gets talked about at the bar. This is the viral social moment the product is built around — a real, live, witnessed leaderboard flip. Word of mouth from one Clutch moment can recruit an entire new group.
🏰 MOAT ANALYSIS — GAME DAY v2
The Clutch mechanic is legally protective: Because Clutch is a free-to-play, IQ-points-only competition with no real-money stakes, it sits clearly outside gambling regulation. But the psychological experience — the stakes, the crowd, the leaderboard flip — is more intense than most real-money products. This is the moat: a gambling-grade emotional experience with zero regulatory exposure.
Venue loyalty lock-in: When users associate specific Clutch moments ("I came back from #7 at Murphy's Bar last Sunday") with physical venues, they return to that venue to recreate the experience. This makes SportsIQ an active driver of venue foot traffic — which is the strongest possible argument for venue partnerships and a monthly SaaS fee.
Data at peak moment: Clutch Pick multiplier selection under pressure — knowing exactly what's at stake, watching the live leaderboard — is the highest-fidelity behavioral data point SportsIQ collects. A user who goes 5× Clutch at a venue bar is a verified high-engagement sports fan with a documented risk appetite. That profile is worth 5× an average user to advertisers.
Home Idle v2 — Between Games, Still Hooked
The state users see most of the time. Trivia IQ + win rate hero, daily challenge streak, upcoming props feed, friends recent picks. Based on Mark's answers (idea-008).

🏰 MOAT ANALYSIS — HOME IDLE v2
IQ Score as identity: Showing the Trivia IQ (847) + Trivia Depth (9.2) on the home screen makes it the user's sports identity — not just a number. A user with a 9.2 NFL IQ has put in months of daily trivia to earn that. They will not reset to zero on a competitor app.
Idle state is not dead state: Most sports apps are dead on off-days. SportsIQ's idle screen drives three engagements: upcoming props browsing, friends pick feed (social), and daily trivia. All three generate data. None require a live game. This is how SportsIQ achieves 365-day DAU where competitors achieve seasonal spikes.
Friends feed as retention engine: Seeing that JayBird went 3× and won +300 is a pull to open the leaderboard, which is a pull to come back Sunday to compete. The idle home screen isn't a waiting room — it's a social feed that makes Sunday feel closer every day of the week.
Streak mechanics are proven: Duolingo's streak is the single most effective retention mechanic in mobile history. The 10:48 PM scene — "22-day streak at risk, 1h 12m to midnight" — is psychologically identical to Duolingo's owl. Three questions. Three minutes. Streak saved. User returns tomorrow.
v2 UPDATES · 2026-03-21
Daily Challenge v2 📅
Same 5 picks for every user, every day. Refreshes at midnight. Wordle for sports. Creates a shared social moment — everyone's debating the same props. All five picks generate a controlled accuracy dataset across your entire user base.

🏰 MOAT ANALYSIS — DAILY CHALLENGE v2
The Wordle effect: Wordle became a global phenomenon because everyone answered the same puzzle on the same day — the shared experience drove organic word-of-mouth. SportsIQ's Daily Challenge creates the same dynamic for sports. "Did you get pick 5?" is a conversation that happens at the bar, in the group chat, everywhere. A competitor can copy the format but cannot copy the user base having this conversation.
Controlled accuracy data: Every user answering the same 5 props on the same day creates a perfectly controlled experiment. We can calculate each user's genuine accuracy rate vs. the market — not confounded by different pick selection. After 90 days of daily challenges, SportsIQ knows who the sharp users actually are. This is a dataset no sportsbook has.
Streak mechanics: A user on a 22-day challenge streak has opened the app 22 consecutive days. At 30 days, the churn probability drops to near zero — they will not miss a day. One skip per week is a crucial design choice: it prevents frustration breaks that kill streaks, which extends the retention curve significantly.
Sequential unlock design: Picks 4 and 5 unlock only after completing the prior pick. This drives completion rates — once a user is 3/5, the sunk-cost effect pulls them to finish. Average session time increases with each pick submitted. This is standard mobile game design applied to sports.
v2 UPDATES · 2026-03-21
Sports DNA Profile 🧬
The user-facing identity layer. 847 IQ. 74% NFL win rate. 22-day streak. None of this transfers to a competitor. This is SportsIQ's deepest switching cost — every pick makes it harder to leave.

🏰 MOAT ANALYSIS — SPORTS DNA PROFILE
The ultimate switching cost: A user with IQ 847, a 342-160 all-time record, and 22-day streak has built an identity on SportsIQ. Every pick adds to that record. If they leave, that record disappears. No competitor offers this accumulated identity. This is stronger than a loyalty program — it's not points they're leaving behind, it's who they are as a sports fan.
Pick style analysis as engagement hook: "Contrarian Lean — you beat the crowd 71% when going against it" is a stat only SportsIQ can show because it requires years of behavioral data. Every time a user reads this, they understand that insight only exists because they've been here long enough. It's a self-reinforcing lock-in.
Public profile as social network layer: Phone 3 shows that profiles are social objects — BigMike's IQ, streak, and DNA are visible to friends, which creates social comparison, Chirp triggers, and competition. This turns the profile page into a social feed entry point, not just a stats page.
Advertiser data without friction: Fan Type ("Bar Regular"), Sports DNA depth bars, and pick style together paint a complete advertiser segment without asking the user anything they'd object to. The profile they're proud to show friends is exactly the data that drives the $5–15 ARPU ad revenue model.
v2 UPDATES · 2026-03-21
Bar Crew Management 🍺
The social backbone of SportsIQ. Every screen references "Bar Crew" — this is where it's created. Groups create a second-order switching cost: a user won't leave because their entire crew is here. 12 friends locked in is harder to displace than any single user.

🏰 MOAT ANALYSIS — BAR CREW MANAGEMENT
Group switching costs multiply individual switching costs: A single user leaving SportsIQ loses their IQ score and history. A 12-person crew leaving would require coordinating 12 people to move simultaneously, set up the same group elsewhere, and convince the platform to honor their history. This is essentially impossible. The first person to leave the crew loses their social context — the crew is the app's stickiest feature.
Prize pools create financial lock-in: Once a crew has paid $20 each into a weekly pool, they have $240 riding on that week. Every member now has a financial reason to engage with every pick window. This converts passive users into active ones — paid pools are likely to drive 3-5× the pick rate vs. free crews.
Trash talk is engagement infrastructure: The Chirp/trash talk feed transforms the app from a stats tool into a social communication channel. Every loss is a social event. SarahK going 1-4 isn't just a bad week — it's content that drives 5 reactions and two follow-up chirps. This creates engagement that has nothing to do with sports or picks, and everything to do with friendship and competition.
Venue connection creates B2B lock-in too: When crews connect to a venue (Murphy's Bar), the venue owner now has 12 loyal customers who specifically come to that bar for Game Day Mode. This is a direct line from the social product to the B2B revenue — venue operators will pay to be the "home" of active crews.
v2 UPDATES · 2026-03-21
Referral & Viral Growth 🚀
The acquisition engine that costs $0. "Can you beat my 847 IQ?" is a more compelling install prompt than any ad. Every invite carries social identity and personal challenge — conversion rates are 3-5× cold installs because the new user already knows who they're competing against.

🚀 GROWTH ANALYSIS — REFERRAL LOOP
Challenge framing converts better than feature framing: "Download SportsIQ — make better picks" is a cold value proposition. "Can you beat my 847 IQ?" is a personal challenge from someone the recipient knows. The recipient already has a mental model of the inviter's sports knowledge and a reason to compete. This framing is native to how men talk about sports — it maps to how bar arguments actually work.
Pre-seeded social context removes onboarding friction: A new user who clicks a challenge link already knows their first crew (inviter's crew), their first competitor (the person who challenged them), and their goal (beat their IQ). That's three pieces of context that normally take weeks to develop organically. First-session pick rates for referred users should be 2-3× organic signups.
IQ bonus rewards compound: +50 IQ per referral sounds small, but at 8 referrals that's +400 IQ — equivalent to roughly 80 successful picks. A user who recruits aggressively accelerates their own leaderboard position, which creates a second-order incentive to invite even more people. The referral loop feeds the competitive loop.
"Nudge DannyB" closes the loop: Most referral programs stop at the click. SportsIQ shows you exactly who clicked but hasn't activated, and lets you send a personal nudge — which has a much higher completion rate than a generic automated email because it comes from a friend's message, not a system notification.
v2 UPDATES · 2026-03-21
Venue B2B Onboarding 🏟️
The B2B flywheel: each venue that signs up drives 20–50 new consumer installs. A bar owner doesn't need to understand the product — they need to see one number: how much more money they make on game nights. Everything else is secondary.

🏰 MOAT ANALYSIS — B2B VENUE FLYWHEEL
Each venue is a consumer acquisition channel: A bar with 23 players per session generates 23 SportsIQ app installs that night. If 10 of those players come back the next week, they bring the app with them — to other bars, to friends, to home viewing. A network of 500 venues is an organic acquisition machine producing ~11,500 active users per game week at zero marginal cost per install.
The free tier is a Trojan horse: Starter free with a 20-player cap creates immediate value, then hits the wall at exactly the moment success is visible. The upgrade prompt fires when the bar owner is watching 23 players compete in real time — conversion from free to paid happens at peak emotional engagement, not during a cold sales call.
Venue lock-in mirrors consumer lock-in: A bar owner who has promoted SportsIQ to their regulars, printed QR codes, and built a crew of loyal Thursday night players has created a social contract with their customers. Switching to a competitor would require telling those 23 regulars the game has changed — an awkward conversation no bar owner wants to have.
Sportsbook affiliate revenue makes the B2B sell effortless: If SportsIQ generates $50-200/month in affiliate revenue for the venue (by deepening player engagement with sports betting adjacent content), the venue is effectively being paid to adopt the product. CAC for B2B drops toward zero when the product pays for itself.

WHAT IS SPORTS DNA?
Your Sports DNA is built automatically from every pick you make. Over time it reveals your fan profile: which sports you know best, how you pick under pressure, whether you follow the crowd or go contrarian. It's a living profile that gets more accurate the more you play.

Crew Challenge — H2H + Group · Unified · 2026-03-22
One feature for both 1v1 and groups. Add 1 opponent = Head-to-Head. Add 2–5 = Group Battle. Same prop, same window, same IQ stakes — winner earns real IQ from all losers. Works asynchronously (each player picks in their own window). No separate Group feature needed.

Phone 3 — Result: you won, +150 IQ from Mike, H2H now 4-4, rematch CTA
🏰 MOAT ANALYSIS — HEAD-TO-HEAD CHALLENGE
Retention mechanic with no parallel: A challenge from a specific friend is a personal social contract — ignoring it creates social friction. This forces daily opens even on non-game days. DraftKings has no equivalent social layer; their "contests" are anonymous. SportsIQ's direct challenges create named rivalries — a fundamentally different (and stickier) dynamic.
Organic acquisition engine: Every challenge sent is an implicit invite. If the recipient isn't a SportsIQ user, they must install to respond. Cost of acquisition: $0. The challenger is doing the recruiting. At scale, 10% of challenges going to non-users = meaningful organic install loop.
H2H record as switching cost: After 20 challenges with Mike, your 4-4 H2H record is a data asset you'd lose by switching apps. Rivalries accumulate history; history creates lock-in.
IQ transfer as status currency: Losing 150 IQ to Mike in a direct challenge is more painful (and thus motivating) than losing 150 IQ in an anonymous crowd contest. Status effects are amplified when the opponent is named.

🏰 MOAT ANALYSIS — MY STATS v2
Proprietary behavioral data compound over time: Every pick generates pick-timing data, contrarian-lean signals, and per-sport calibration. After 502 picks, the system knows you better than you know yourself. Competitors starting from zero can't replicate 6 months of behavioral fingerprint — they'd need to acquire the user AND their data.
Identity investment creates switching costs: "Level 14 · Top 12% Globally" is not a number — it's identity. Users who see themselves as "NFL Sage" badge-holders have psychological ownership of their SportsIQ profile. Switching to DraftKings means starting as a nobody again. The longer they're on the platform, the more identity they'd be abandoning.
Social rivalry data is irreplaceable: A 4-4 H2H record against BigMike exists only in SportsIQ. That specific rivalry, those specific outcomes, that specific leaderboard position — none of it transfers. The social graph + history is the stickiest data asset in the product.
"65 IQ behind BigMike, ~13 days" is the addiction engine: Goal proximity creates daily opens. The user doesn't need a push notification — the goal card is enough. Every session is progress toward overtaking Mike. This is the same psychological mechanism as Duolingo streaks, executed with far higher stakes (social status among real friends).
My Stats v3 — Context-Aware Data Surfacing · Right Stat at Right Time
Not everything always. 3 context states: (1) Default — essentials only, clean layout. (2) Pre-game — your stats for the specific player/prop in the upcoming pick window. (3) H2H preview — your H2H record vs upcoming opponent, surfaced only when that match is near. Same data, smarter timing.

🏰 MOAT ANALYSIS — BAR LIVE PICK v4
Proprietary crowd data is the product: By removing Polymarket/Kalshi from the bar screen, SportsIQ crowd becomes the only signal in the room. The 68/32 split is SportsIQ's data — generated by SportsIQ users, owned by SportsIQ. Every person who stares at that screen and picks OVER is generating behavioral data that Kalshi can't see. The bar TV is a data-collection flywheel disguised as entertainment.
The bar screen is SportsIQ's acquisition machine: Every non-user watching the bar screen is one scan away from installing the app. The QR + 5-digit room code gives two paths to join — camera-first and manual. At 50 bars with 30 spectators each, that's 1,500 potential installs per night. No paid CAC.
The "2× bar multiplier" creates location lock-in: Users who discover they earn twice the points when playing at a bar venue will prefer playing at bars over playing alone at home. This drives foot traffic to venues (venue owner benefit) while increasing SportsIQ engagement per session. DraftKings has no equivalent location-aware multiplier.

HOME v4 — CRITICAL (:03 · Clean CTA)
Challenges v2 — ONE Unified Feature for 1v1 + Groups
Mark's direction: no separate H2H and Groups. One "Challenges" tab that scales from 1 opponent to 10. Select friends → set stake → challenge. Whether it's 1v1 or a 6-person group, the flow is identical. The pot scales with participants. Eliminates UI confusion permanently.

CHALLENGES — Group Result · +200 IQ
⚔️ DESIGN RATIONALE — UNIFIED CHALLENGES
One concept, not two: "H2H" and "Groups" are the same interaction at different participant counts. A unified "Challenges" tab with multi-select removes the cognitive overhead of "which feature do I use?" — you just pick people. Selecting 1 = 1v1. Selecting 5 = group challenge. The UI never branches.
IQ pot creates real stakes: Mark confirmed — real IQ points. 100 IQ per player × 3 players = 300 IQ pot. Winner takes all. This creates a genuine economic stake that makes every challenge feel meaningful without involving real money. Legal, compelling, high retention.
Moat from challenges: After 20 challenges with BigMike (4-4 record, 3 rematches), that rivalry history is locked to SportsIQ. A user switching to another app loses their rivalries. Named history between specific people is a switching cost that anonymous tournament brackets can never replicate.
Organic acquisition built in: Challenging a non-user sends them an install link. The challenger is doing free acquisition. Every challenge = potential new install.
Home · Idle v3 — Full-height layout, real-time feed, 4am ET reset
Fixes the "scrunched to top" issue. Side-by-side stats grid. Real-time friends activity feed. 4am ET daily IQ reset timer. Two states: no game today vs game tonight.

Phone 3 — Pro pick: 15-min early access · sets crowd signal · full signal breakdown · 2026-03-22
Pick Card v5 — Archetype Edge Activation · Multiplier Selector (2× Free / 5× Pro)
Mar 22 2026 · Two critical gaps fixed. (1) Archetype integration: when your archetype (e.g. "The Dome King") matches the current game context, a banner fires before you pick. Identity + action collide at peak intent. (2) Multiplier selector: v4 said "unlocks after you pick" — Isaac had nothing to build. v5 shows the full post-pick selector: 1×/2× free (2× = Max Free), 3×/4×/5× locked with Pro badge. Pro state (Phone 3): all 5 unlocked, 5× gold "ALL-IN." This is the primary revenue mechanic. Every pick is a conversion touchpoint.

Phone 3 — Pro multiplier: all 5 unlocked · 5× gold ALL-IN selected · archetype 1.5× contrarian boost
Pick Card v6 — Sharp Money Intelligence · Simplified 1×/2×/5× · Concrete Pro Math
2026-03-22 · Three upgrades targeting the single highest-revenue moment in the app. (1) Sharp Money split: Public % vs. Sharp % side-by-side. When they diverge the tension is electric — users feel like insiders with real intelligence. Sharp % is blurred/locked for free users → natural Pro conversion at highest engagement moment. Proprietary data competitors can't replicate without the same pick volume. (2) Multiplier simplified to 1×/2×/5× — matches Isaac's actual codebase, eliminates cognitive overload from 5 tiers, makes the gap to 5× feel aspirational. (3) Concrete Pro math: locked 5× shows "You'd win +425 more IQ with Pro" — personalized, loss-aversion driven. Phone 3 shows the Pro Preview mini-sheet that fires on 5× tap: side-by-side +200 vs. +500 IQ comparison before the full paywall. This is the conversion sequence that turns casual free users into subscribers.

POST-PICK · 3× ONLY · Calibration shows after high-stakes confirm
🎯 DESIGN RATIONALE — PICK CARD v3
Signal before pick (not after): In v1/v2, signal appeared after the user picked. In v3 it appears ABOVE the pick buttons so users consider SportsIQ's read before choosing. This is the key behavior change — it adds value to the pick experience, not just the result.
From day 1: Every new user sees the signal immediately. No unlock gate. We want to build the habit of checking SportsIQ Signal early — it's our core differentiator and should be seen on every pick.
Push notification: When the pick window opens, a push fires with the Signal direction pre-populated. Users see SportsIQ's lean before opening the app. This is the hook — they get useful information even before they engage.
Crowd split visible during pick: Showing 63% OVER in real-time during the pick phase creates both social proof and contrarian opportunity. It's information that helps users make a more informed decision.
Real signal data only: Signal shows actual crowd numbers ("63% of 1,284 live players picked OVER") — no fabricated confidence scores. Proprietary data from real players is the moat. Fake stats are worthless.
Calibration on 3× picks only: Post-pick calibration question fires only when a user commits 3× IQ (high-stakes). At 1× it's noise — at 3× the user is invested and their answer is signal. This keeps the UX clean while feeding the accuracy engine.
Pick Wait v3 — Instant crowd updates · Live stat ticker · Layout fix
After locking in a pick, this is what users watch for the rest of the game. Crowd % updates instantly. Your pick pinned at top. Live stat counter is the hero. Friends panel below.
PICK LOCKED IN · WATCHING LIVE

Onboarding v5 — Social Proof Splash · Real First Pick · Friend Discovery · 2026-03-22
Activation-focused redesign. Social FOMO before any ask. Real pick instead of tutorial. 4-phone flow: (1) Splash — community context before name/sports. (2) Name + sport (fast). (3) First real pick, full signal visible. (4) Post-pick friend discovery + DNA forming.

Onboarding v6 — V1 Spec · Sport Select → Pick Fires → Name After Hook
Mar 22 2026 · V1 simplicity directive. Three interactions before you're in the game: (1) Pick your sport. (2) Pick OVER or UNDER. (3) What's your name (after the first result). That's it. No social proof splash, no tutorial, no account wall. TikTok principle: show the experience first, then ask for commitment.

WEEK FINAL · 2nd place payout · Final standings · Week 13 reset CTA
🏆 DESIGN RATIONALE — LEADERBOARD v4
Rivalry Engine ("Throne to Take"): The #1 retention driver in competitive apps is a personalized rival — not a faceless ranking. By surfacing the specific person above you with a head-to-head record and a precise IQ gap, we convert passive rank-checking into active competition. This is proprietary behavioral data (H2H records) that competitors can't replicate.
Position delta arrows: ↑2 today / ↓1 / ↑4 this week — each row tells you who's moving and why. Hot Mover callout (🚀+4) creates urgency: if JayBird can jump 4 spots, so can you. This drives more picks, not just more viewing.
Streak badges inline: 🔥7 next to BigMike's name makes the leaderboard read like a sports standings board. Users read it like a newspaper, not a database. Emotional context on every row.
Rank change celebration: The micro-moment of overtaking someone — with a chirp CTA — creates a social sharing hook. The person you passed gets a notification. This generates cross-user engagement from a single pick result.
Weekly close-out payout: Seeing your IQ payout confirmed with a clear "Week 13 starts Monday" resets the clock mentally. The Challenge CTA on the winner drives H2H engagement into the next week.
Sports DNA v2 — Unlocks after 20 picks · Full DNA · Bar Regular archetype · Shareable
Locked state shows progress to unlock. Full DNA reveals pick tendencies, archetypes, sports breakdown. Recommendation: shareable profile card drives organic acquisition. Full-height layout.

Pick Result v1 — Win/Loss Celebration
The dopamine moment when a pick resolves. Three states: WIN (green flood + IQ ticker), LOSS (dignified, keeps them playing), and Share Card (Instagram Story format). This is the most important screen for retention — the celebration drives return visits and the share card drives organic installs.

SHARE CARD — 9:16 Story format · Brand purple
Friends Feed v2 — Pending Picks First · 4-Emoji Reactions · Manual Follow
Four explicit changes from Mark's idea-071: (1) Feed shows picks the instant they're locked, before result settles — anticipation is the hook. (2) Every item has a 4-emoji reaction row (🔥👀😬✅) — simple, no threads. (3) Manual follow only — nothing auto-followed, users choose who they track. (4) All friends shown — "Following 14 · All" with zero algorithmic filtering.

Mahomes · Passing Yards
Home or dome games only. Your best prop by any metric. Keep betting this.
⚠ BLIND SPOT — STOP THIS
2-6
25%
UNDER picks in cold weather
You keep going UNDER when temps are below 35°F. Cold weather doesn't suppress passing as much as you think. Stop it.
THIS WEEK · COACH RECS
Chiefs vs Ravens: You're 8-2 on Mahomes domes. M&T Bank is a dome. Lean OVER.
Bears vs Packers: Lambeau. 28°F forecast. Avoid UNDER — your pattern says you'll get burned.
Your timing: You win 72% when you pick in the first 5 min of a window. You win 54% when you wait. Pick early.
YOUR SEASON ARC
You started 7-2. Then a 4-game cold streak in Week 9. Then 12-5 over the last 17 picks. You recover well from bad stretches — don't tilt. Your floor is 62%, your ceiling in your best prop types is 80%+.

Share Card v2 — Bold Variant · Streak Milestone · Brutal-Beat Loss Card
Resolves three open questions from v1: (1) Dark vs bold colorful — phone 1 shows both variants side by side. (2) Streak milestone card — special 🔥 template fires at 5-pick streak milestone, higher charge = more shares. (3) Brutal-beat loss card — "SO CLOSE, 3 yards" — losses are more frequent and the ironic/painful share is real. Referral link embedded in every card footer: "Beat me at sportsiq.app/ref/marcd" — every share is now a tracked referral too.

Phone 3 — Brutal-beat loss card: "3 yards. The refs did this." · 2026-03-22
Share Card v3 — Archetype Identity · Venue Rank · Instagram Story Format
2026-03-22 · Three new card types that generate the most shares and drive the most new users. (1) Archetype Identity Card: fires when your Sports DNA archetype matched the game and you won. "🏟️ The Dome King called it again" is a deeply personal win that users want to brag about — it shows off their sports identity, not just a number. Converts viewers into "wait, what's my archetype?" users. (2) Venue Rank Brag Card: "#1 at Oaks Bar tonight" geo-localized social proof. This card drives two things simultaneously: new user downloads AND foot traffic to partner bars. A viewer who sees this wants to come to the bar and play. This is the bar venue flywheel made visible. (3) Instagram Story Format: same cards but formatted as 9:16 with top/bottom safe zones, large typography readable at story size, and a "Download SportsIQ" bottom CTA. Stories get 3-5× more impressions than feed posts — this format is how we go viral.

Phone 3 — Instagram Story format: full-bleed 9:16 · "Find your Sports DNA →" CTA · 12,400 social proof · Download button · Stories get 3-5× more impressions than feed posts

🧬 Sports DNA Profile

Mar 22 2026 · The moat that compounds. Every pick accretes into a verified behavioral fingerprint — sport, bet type, conditions, confidence. Users can't abandon their record. Competitors can copy the UI in 6 months; they cannot copy 3 years of verified sharp data. Three screens: (1) Archetype Reveal — the dramatic unlock moment after 10 picks. (2) DNA Profile — full skill fingerprint with archetype, IQ trajectory, win breakdown by sport/condition. (3) Public Sharp Profile — what others see, follow system, social syndicate.

Auditable track record · immutable pick history
Public profile the network effect anchor. Followers = switching cost. 847 followers can't follow you if you leave SportsIQ.

⚡ Active Picks Tray — Overlapping Cadence · Micro-Picks · Live Game Banner

Mar 22 2026 · The core engagement architecture. Two pick types run simultaneously: (1) Game-level picks (2–4hr) — Chiefs ML, Mahomes OVER 284.5 — sit live in a tray while the game plays. (2) Micro-picks (5–7 min) — "Will the next drive score?" — fast-fire, always fresh, resolve and refresh automatically. You always have something resolving in minutes AND something sitting live for hours. No cap on active picks for any user — free or Pro. Pro value: 5× multiplier (vs 2× free), Sharp Money intel, Edge Conditions in DNA. Four screens: (1) Home with Active Picks tray — free user, 3 live picks, new pick CTA open to all. (2) Micro-pick card — Yes/No and Over/Under formats, 1×/2× stakes. (3) Pro state — 4 simultaneous picks, win flash with share hook + streak. (4) Brutal beat — loss state with near-miss stat and "Share the pain" hook.

👥 Social Proof on Picks — Friend + Bar Layers

Mar 22 2026 · Three layers of social signal shown on every pick card. (1) Friends first — most personal, strongest influence. Shows specific first names + pick direction. (2) Bar layer — appears when user is checked in at a venue. "4 people at Yard House picked OVER." Location-aware and only visible in context. (3) Global crowd — background signal, least personal. Hierarchy matters: friends override crowd because social proof from people you know is 10× more persuasive than strangers. Switching cost: the longer you use SportsIQ, the more your friend network picks here — making it increasingly painful to leave. Bar layer creates a venue-specific micro-community that no other app can replicate without SportsIQ's check-in infrastructure.

📤 Win Share Card — Instant 1-Tap at Resolve

Mar 22 2026 · Appears the instant a micro-pick resolves as a WIN. Optimized for speed — one big button, zero friction. The share card (what gets posted) is pre-built and waiting; user just hits Share and picks where to send it. Three views: (1) In-app win resolve overlay — the moment it hits. (2) The share card graphic itself — clean dark branded card, looks great on stories and feeds. (3) Bar check-in prompt — how the app surfaces "You're near Yard House — want to check in?" before picking, so bar layer activates naturally.

🚀 Onboarding Flow — First Pick in Under 60 Seconds

Mar 22 2026 · Five-step activation funnel designed to deliver a user's first pick — and first dopamine hit — within 60 seconds of opening the app. Each step collects personalization data that makes SportsIQ smarter forever. Steps: (1) Welcome splash — value prop in one line. (2) Pick your sports — 3-tap pill selection. (3) Your first live pick — a real game, right now. (4) Reveal moment — win or lose, it's exciting. (5) Friends invite — viral loop trigger. No account required until after step 4.

STEP 1 — WELCOME · ~5 sec
SportsIQ
Pick smarter. Beat your friends.
Win the bar.
Let's play →
No account needed to start
Tagline covers all three loops: personal, social, venue. No sign-up gate — friction-free entry.
STEP 2 — YOUR SPORTS · ~10 sec
Step 2 of 4
Which sports do
you follow?
Pick as many as you want
🏈NFL
🏀NBA
⚾MLB
🏒NHL
⚽Soccer
🏌️Golf
🥊MMA
Next →
2 taps to select NFL + NBA. Immediately personalizes which picks surface first. Data flywheel starts here.
STEP 3 — YOUR FIRST PICK · ~20 sec

Micro-pick: resolves in ~5 min, instant gratification. Countdown ring creates urgency from second one. No tutorial — the pick IS the onboarding. Win = dopamine hit before step 4.
STEP 4 — THE REVEAL · ~5 sec
🎯

Chiefs scored · YES
+50 IQ
First win 🎉

Dopamine moment. Whether they win or lose — the reveal is exciting. "You beat 61%" creates instant status. CTA naturally flows into step 5.
STEP 5 — INVITE FRIENDS · ~10 sec

Contacts pre-loaded. One tap to invite all — or selectively. "See how your friends did" ties directly back to the win moment. Viral loop triggers here.

🍺 Bar Leaderboard — Live Venue Rankings

Mar 22 2026 · The bar layer in full. Once checked in at a venue, a live leaderboard shows every SportsIQ player at that bar tonight — ranked by IQ earned since check-in. Top player earns the Bar Champion 👑 badge for the night. Badge is contextual — only visible when the champion is physically at that bar, never on their global profile. Ephemeral authority: you're the king of this room, right now. Resets every visit, so the crown is always up for grabs. Three views: (1) The bar leaderboard itself — live rankings, your position highlighted, Bar Champion at top. (2) Bar Champion badge on the pick card — shows only while checked in at that bar. (3) End-of-night recap — your performance, shareable card, rivalry hook for next visit.

👥 Social Feed — Real-Time Friend Picks

Mar 22 2026 · The Social tab — a live feed of what your friends are picking right now. Not a static leaderboard; a scrollable activity stream showing picks as they happen, resolve as they end, and call-outs when a friend disagrees with you. Three views: (1) The feed itself — friend pick cards in real time, with split indicators when they go opposite you. (2) A friend's pick detail — expand any card to see their full pick, reasoning, and pick on the opposite side. (3) Bar-mode feed — when checked in, bar picks surface in an amber layer above the friend feed. Moat: the feed gets richer the more friends you have on SportsIQ — every friend added makes the product more valuable and more painful to leave.

Home Idle v5 — Pro Signal Teaser · Today's Rank · Streak Urgency
Every session starts here. v4 had zero Pro conversion, no rank visibility, no streak urgency. v5 adds: (1) Pro Signal locked card → direct revenue trigger at peak intent. (2) Today's rank in header → #1 daily habit driver in prediction apps. (3) Streak urgency → immediate action even on non-game nights. These three additions turn the most-seen screen into the primary revenue + retention engine.

Home Idle v6 — Bar Regular Archetype · Identity-Forward Personalization
Mar 22 2026 · idea-079 · Mark: "bar regular is fun · embedded in home idle screen · just experience the personalization." Archetype (🏟️ The Dome King) is auto-generated from pick history and surfaced as the hero card on home idle — above the fold, no explanation of how it was built. Phone 1: archetype card between games (private, Pro-locked breakdown teaser). Phone 2: bar check-in recognizes you as a regular — "The Dome King is here · #2 at this bar." Phone 3: archetype evolution notification in-app when your pattern shifts.

⚡ SportsIQ Pro v3
Mar 22 2026 · Strategic refinement: v2 had 8 perks in a grid — too much cognitive load at the moment of decision. v3 applies the V1 "simple, no friction" rule to the paywall itself. Three contextual triggers, each with a SINGLE personal hook instead of a feature list. The Prop Coach quote references real user data ("Your Dome King edge"). Conversion science says single-benefit paywalls outperform feature grids by 30-40%. No change to price ($4.99) or perks — just a radically cleaner presentation.
🏟️

5× is locked for free users

TRIGGER 3: Archetype coach unlock · Real patterns preview · Blurred blind spots
🏆 Leaderboard v5 — V1 Rank Tab · Rank + History combined
Mar 22 2026 · Applying Mark's "condense and combine" directive. V4 was pre-simplicity: IQ pools, 30% rake display, 3 sub-tabs, rivalry engine — too much cognitive load for V1. V5 collapses the Rank tab AND the History tab into one screen. Top half: your rank card (archetype badge + rank number + one rival). Bottom half: your last 5 picks with won/lost/pending status + IQ earned. No sub-tabs. No IQ pool. Instant scan. This IS the Rank tab in the V1 4-tab nav.

Mobile App — 3-Screen Architecture v1 · Pick · Result · Leaderboard · 2026-03-22
Complete redesign of the mobile app information architecture. Three swipeable screens replace all previous navigation patterns. Every feature is condensed into states within these 3 screens. Settings accessed by tapping the IQ points balance in the persistent header. Design principle: simple shell, jam-packed with features, deeply addictive.

7-day free trial · 2× picks · 5× multiplier · Prop Coach
FEATURE CONDENSATION MAP — EVERY OLD SCREEN → NEW HOME
🎯 PICK SCREEN
• Home Live/Idle → Pick Idle + Waiting states
• Pick Card → Pick Active state
• Pick Wait → Pick Waiting state
• Daily Challenge → Pick Daily Challenge state
• Game Day → Pick Game Day state
• Pre-game Brief → Pick Idle intel panel
• Trivia → Daily Challenge state
• Crew Picks → Pick Waiting state
• Multiplier Selector → Pick Active state
• Archetype Edge → Pick Active state
🏆 RESULT SCREEN
• Pick Result → Result Win/Loss states
• Share Card → Result Win state
• Near-miss psychology → Result Loss state
• Prop Coach → Result Loss state (Pro upsell)
• Live game tracker → Result Pending state
👥 LEADERBOARD SCREEN
• Friends Feed → Leaderboard Friends tab
• Global Leaderboard → Leaderboard Global tab
• Bar Crew Mgmt → Leaderboard Venue tab
• Head-to-Head → Leaderboard Challenge tab
• Challenges → Leaderboard Challenge tab
• Referral → Settings Friends tab
• My Stats → Settings Stats tab
• Sports DNA → Settings Profile tab
• SportsIQ Pro → Settings Pro tab
• Notifications → Settings Profile → Notifs
• Onboarding → Pick Idle first-run state
Bar Experience v1 — Full Evening Flow · Pick · Result · Leaderboard · 2026-03-22
Every screen and state mapped to the bar journey — from walking in to last call. Shows which states activate when, what bar-specific UI layers appear, and how the phone connects to the bar TV display. The bar is SportsIQ's killer context: high emotion, social pressure, real stakes, instant gratification.
BAR NIGHT TIMELINE — 6 MOMENTS, 3 SCREENS
📍
Arrive
Check in
PICK · Idle
🎯
Pick opens
Make your pick
PICK · Active
🔒
Game starts
Watch + track
RESULT · Live
⚔️
Bar battle
Challenge crew
LB · Venue
🏆
Result hits
Win/lose
RESULT · Win
🍺
End of night
Final board
LB · Venue
📺
Bar TV (SportsIQ Barscreen) mirrors the Venue leaderboard throughout the night. Player names appear on the big screen when they make picks and win. The bar TV and phone are in sync — the crowd sees what you're doing. This is the hook that makes strangers engage each other.
BAR LAYER — PERSISTENT ACROSS ALL 3 SCREENS
Once checked in to a venue, every screen gets a bar context strip in the header. Always visible, always live.
⚡ SportsIQ
🔥 7
2,840 IQ ▸
📍 At a sports bar?
Check In
BEFORE CHECK-IN
Home mode · Check-in CTA visible
→
⚡ SportsIQ
🔥 7
2,840 IQ ▸
🍺 Sideline Bar & Grill
23 playing You: #5 📺
Bar Battle active · Top scorer wins a round 🍺 · 2 picks remaining
AFTER CHECK-IN — BAR MODE
Venue strip · Rank · Bar Battle status · TV sync 📺
WHAT BAR MODE ADDS TO EVERY SCREEN
●
Venue strip — always visible below header. Shows bar name, player count, your rank, and 📺 TV sync indicator.
●
Bar Battle status — runs all night. Top scorer at the bar wins a social prize (round of drinks, discount). Creates urgency.
●
📺 TV sync — phone mirrors what's on the bar TV. Your wins and picks appear on the big screen. Public = pressure = engagement.
●
Social pick context — every pick card shows "N others here picked OVER" not just the global crowd %.
MOMENT 1 — ARRIVE AT THE BAR · PICK SCREEN · Idle State
User walks in. App detects nearby venue or they tap check-in. Idle state transforms: upcoming games now show who at the bar is picking them.

BAR TV · Final state
Winner announced · Download CTA for non-players
BAR EXPERIENCE DESIGN PRINCIPLES
📱 Phone is the controller
Pick on your phone. Results on your phone. But your name appears on the big screen — creating public stakes that make the game more thrilling and make others want in.
🍺 Bar Battle is the hook
Not just IQ points — a real social prize at the bar. Top scorer wins a round, a discount, recognition. Tangible reward makes every pick feel higher stakes.
📺 TV creates FOMO
Non-players watch the bar TV, see friends winning, see the leaderboard — and want in. The bar TV is SportsIQ's best acquisition tool. Every bar night creates new users.
⚡ Glanceable UI
Bar environment: loud, distracted, beer in one hand. Every screen optimized for 2-second glances. Huge numbers, minimal text, clear color coding (green = winning).
🔄 Loss = immediate next pick
Losses at the bar are the highest-risk churn moment. Redemption pick CTA fires instantly: "Win this → jump from #4 to #2." No wallowing — always a path back.
📅 End of night = next visit hook
Final standings fire a "Rematch?" challenge and a "Defend your title Thursday" reminder. Turns a one-time bar visit into a recurring weekly ritual.
Leaderboard v6 — Social Engine · Friends · Challenges · Referral · 2026-03-22
The Leaderboard is the 3rd swipe screen — the social spine of SportsIQ. This refinement makes the Friends tab a live pick-activity feed with inline challenge buttons, a frictionless friend invite (referral engine), and smart friend suggestions by Sports DNA archetype. The Challenge tab adds H2H duels. Together these create the daily return habit and viral acquisition loop. Every 1 new user who invites 2 friends = 2× growth. This screen is the multiplier.
LEADERBOARD SCREEN — 4 TABS, EACH A DIFFERENT HOOK
Friends tab
Live pick feed from people you know. React, chirp, challenge. See who's hot and who's on a losing streak. Creates daily FOMO — you check the app to see if Rachel blew her pick.
→ Retention driver
Global tab
Competitive context. Where you stand nationally and in your sport. Archetype leaderboards. Hall of fame picks. Creates aspirational ladder to climb.
→ Aspiration driver
Venue tab
Auto-selects when checked in to a bar. Bar Battle standings. Real-time rank among people physically near you. The TV screen mirrors this.
→ Bar engagement
Challenge tab
Active H2H duels. Send challenges, accept or decline. Win a duel = bonus IQ + bragging rights. Creates 1:1 rivalries that keep both users engaged.
→ Session depth
FRIENDS TAB — LIVE PICK ACTIVITY FEED + INVITE ENGINE
The feed that makes people open SportsIQ daily. Live friend activity: who picked what, who won, who's on a streak. React, chirp, challenge inline. Invite CTA when friend list is small — unlocks a real reward (Bar Crew Mode).

DUELS TAB — H2H CHALLENGES · ACTIVE + INCOMING + CREATE
Head-to-head pick challenges. You both pick the same prop — better pick wins bonus IQ. Creates 1:1 rivalries that keep both players returning. "Dave challenged you on the Chiefs pick" = instant re-engagement. Bar mode: challenge the person next to you on the same prop you're both watching.

WHY THE LEADERBOARD SCREEN DRIVES PROFITABILITY
Daily return loop
Friends feed shows live activity. Rachel missed her pick → you feel compelled to check (and chirp). This creates a daily return habit even on non-game days. Target: D30 retention +40% vs. pick-only users.
Referral engine
Bar Crew Mode unlock (requires 3 friends) is the incentive that turns users into recruiters. Personalized link + pre-written message removes friction. Each user that invites 2+ friends = app grows. Target: viral coefficient > 1.0.
Pro conversion
Global tab shows top players are ⚡ Pro with 5× multipliers. The IQ gap is visible. "Top 10 global are all Pro" is the social proof that converts free users. Target: 12% free → Pro conversion from leaderboard screen.
